property_issue_summary: Multiple dampness issues at skirting levels in Hall, Common Bedroom, Master Bedroom, and Kitchen, along with tile hollowness in bathrooms. External wall cracks and parking area seepage. Thermal anomalies indicate potential moisture-related issues.
probable_root_cause: Plumbing issues (leakage) and seepage from external walls.
recommended_actions: Investigate and repair plumbing issues causing dampness and tile hollowness.. Re-plaster affected areas with dampness issues.. Inspect and repair external wall cracks.. Address parking area seepage.. Investigate thermal anomalies to identify heat loss or moisture.. Provide complete customer details for accurate report.. Schedule follow-up inspection to verify repairs.
missing_information: Customer Name. Mobile. Email. Address. Property Age. Detailed description of thermal anomalies
